description: Edge case: three-way merge — one canonical, two duplicates. Uses keep_highest_confidence so that whichever of the three has the highest confidence wins for any disputed field.
notes: canonical and duplicates use entity-name strings (per spec: "the surviving entity id or name"), not ULIDs. This is the alternate addressing mode supported by the schema. When strategy=keep_highest_confidence, ties are broken by created_at (older wins) — see Editor's note in docs/spec/v0.md §3.4.
